Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 76 

PRVDR_BIRTH_DT 

LABEL: Provider Date of Birth 

DESCRIPTION: Date of birth of the provider. Applicable to individual providers only. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_BIRTH_DT 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_BIRTH_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 05JUN1954 

COMMENT: Derived from the same
